channel.title: General Conference - The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
channel.description: Audio recordings from General Conference of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints. Includes talks from Church leaders delivered during the semi-annual worldwide broadcasts.
channel.copyright: © 2026 by Intellectual Reserve, Inc. All rights reserved.
channel.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
channel.itunes:summary: Audio recordings from General Conference of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints. Includes talks from Church leaders delivered during the semi-annual worldwide broadcasts.

itunes:owner.itunes:name: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints

image.title: General Conference - The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints

item.title: Saturday Morning Session (Full Session) - April 2026 general conference
item.description:
Saturday Morning Session

April 2026 general conference

Full session recording including all talks and musical numbers.

Speakers:

  • President Dallin H. Oaks - "Introduction"
  • Presented by President D. Todd Christofferson - "Solemn Assembly"
  • Elder Patrick Kearon - "About His Business"
  • Sister Kristin M. Yee - "Ministering—“That Ye Love One Another; as I Have Loved You”"
  • Elder Clark G. Gilbert - "Come Home"
  • Elder David A. Bednar - "All Who Have Endured Valiantly"
  • Elder Michael John U. Teh - "Follow the Prophet; He Knows the Way"
  • Elder Jorge T. Becerra - "Tithing—Putting God First"
  • President Henry B. Eyring - "Prayers for Peace"
item.itunes:title: Saturday Morning Session (Full Session)
item.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
item.itunes:summary:
Saturday Morning Session

April 2026 general conference

Full session recording including all talks and musical numbers.

Speakers:

  • President Dallin H. Oaks - "Introduction"
  • Presented by President D. Todd Christofferson - "Solemn Assembly"
  • Elder Patrick Kearon - "About His Business"
  • Sister Kristin M. Yee - "Ministering—“That Ye Love One Another; as I Have Loved You”"
  • Elder Clark G. Gilbert - "Come Home"
  • Elder David A. Bednar - "All Who Have Endured Valiantly"
  • Elder Michael John U. Teh - "Follow the Prophet; He Knows the Way"
  • Elder Jorge T. Becerra - "Tithing—Putting God First"
  • President Henry B. Eyring - "Prayers for Peace"

By President Dallin H. Oaks

item.title: Saturday Afternoon Session (Full Session) - April 2026 general conference
item.description:
Saturday Afternoon Session

April 2026 general conference

Full session recording including all talks and musical numbers.

Speakers:

  • Presented by President D. Todd Christofferson - "Sustaining of General Authorities, Area Seventies, and General Officers"
  • Presented by Jared B. Larson - "Church Auditing Department Report, 2025"
  • Elder Gary E. Stevenson - "Lost Luggage, Redeemed Souls"
  • Elder Eduardo F. Ortega - "Christ—Author and Finisher of Our Faith"
  • Elder Wan-Liang Wu - "“I Will Give Away All My Sins to Know Thee”"
  • Brother David J. Wunderli - "Jesus Christ Is Not Our Burden; He Is Our Relief"
  • Elder Gérald Caussé - "Love All; Love Each"
  • Elder Brian J. Holmes - "Jesus Christ Is the Way"
  • Elder Clement M. Matswagothata - "He Knows You by Name"
  • Elder Ulisses Soares - "Jesus Christ—the True Vine"
item.itunes:title: Saturday Afternoon Session (Full Session)
item.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints

item.title: Sunday Morning Session (Full Session) - April 2026 general conference
item.description:
Sunday Morning Session

April 2026 general conference

Full session recording including all talks and musical numbers.

Speakers:

  • President Dieter F. Uchtdorf - "Encounter at the Empty Tomb"
  • President Emily Belle Freeman - "Best Days and Worst Days"
  • Elder Pedro X. Larreal - "I Feel My Savior’s Love"
  • Elder Edward B. Rowe - "Choose Jesus Christ as Your Guide"
  • Elder Ronald A. Rasband - "He Is Risen"
  • Elder Dale G. Renlund - "Because of Jesus Christ"
  • Elder Thierry K. Mutombo - "The Joy of a Covenant Relationship with God"
  • Elder Alan R. Walker - "A Peculiar Treasure"
  • President Dallin H. Oaks - "Alive in Christ"
item.itunes:title: Sunday Morning Session (Full Session)
item.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
item.itunes:summary:
Sunday Morning Session

April 2026 general conference

Full session recording including all talks and musical numbers.

Speakers:

  • President Dieter F. Uchtdorf - "Encounter at the Empty Tomb"
  • President Emily Belle Freeman - "Best Days and Worst Days"
  • Elder Pedro X. Larreal - "I Feel My Savior’s Love"
  • Elder Edward B. Rowe - "Choose Jesus Christ as Your Guide"
  • Elder Ronald A. Rasband - "He Is Risen"
  • Elder Dale G. Renlund - "Because of Jesus Christ"
  • Elder Thierry K. Mutombo - "The Joy of a Covenant Relationship with God"
  • Elder Alan R. Walker - "A Peculiar Treasure"
  • President Dallin H. Oaks - "Alive in Christ"

item.title: Sunday Afternoon Session (Full Session) - April 2026 general conference
item.description:
Sunday Afternoon Session

April 2026 general conference

Full session recording including all talks and musical numbers.

Speakers:

  • President D. Todd Christofferson - "The Character of Christ"
  • Elder Chi Hong (Sam) Wong - "Remember, Remember"
  • Elder Aaron T. Hall - "I Glory in My Jesus"
  • President Susan H. Porter - "“Here Am I, Send Me”"
  • Elder Neil L. Andersen - "Eternal Marriage Is an Eternal Journey"
  • Elder Quentin L. Cook - "Keys, Covenants, and Easter"
  • Elder Taniela B. Wakolo - "Come unto Christ—Together"
  • Elder Gerrit W. Gong - "’Tis Eastertide: No One Walks Alone"
  • President Dallin H. Oaks - "Closing Remarks"
item.itunes:title: Sunday Afternoon Session (Full Session)
item.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
item.itunes:summary:

  • President Dallin H. Oaks - "Closing Remarks"
